description: Mine Cards green-screen source images that expose chroma holes, soft shadows, glow, and particle cutout failures.

cases.label: Green key inside ring hole
cases.notes: Candidate B normalized component_8; intake reported 6034 exact key conflicts.

cases.label: Green key in object gaps
cases.notes: Candidate B normalized component_5; key-color conflicts remain after background normalization.

cases.label: Green background armor with highlight/shadow conflicts
cases.notes: Armor crop flattened onto green-screen source; tests whether cutout preserves highlights and dark material shading.

cases.label: Green background sign with soft cast shadow
cases.notes: Controlled sign fixture with semitransparent cast shadow flattened onto green; shows how single-background extraction handles shadow softness.

cases.label: Green background real soft shadow sprite
cases.notes: Existing runtime shadow sprite flattened onto green; tests whether single-background extraction preserves soft alpha edges without green halo.

cases.label: Legendary angel wings (white-plate source)
cases.notes: Real white-plate source used directly (no green recomposite). Single-background keys on white and necessarily eats the white feathers; only dual-plate (white+black) recovers them — a true path-2 asset.
